items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Software stocks bounced after the latest bout of selling, lifting the major averages to a winning session Tuesday.

items.title: BAE Systems awarded $500 million contract for Paladin Self-Propelled Howitzers
items.description: BAE Systems (LON: BA) received a contract award valued at more than $500 million to produce additional M109A7 Paladin Self-Propelled Howitzers and M992A3 Ammunition Carriers for the U.S. Army.

items.title: Boeing Co. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day

items.title: PFFD: Lagging Competitors In A Lagging ETF Category
BAE Systems delivers 100,000th APKWS® laser-guidance kit
items.description: BAE Systems (LON: BA) recently delivered its 100,000th APKWS® laser-guidance kit, marking a major production milestone as it continues providing U.S. armed forces and allies with low-cost, reliable precision munitions.
